summary: Clear, well‑balanced soundboard recording from the July 1978 run that sounds great even though it lacks audience cheer.
review: The reviewer praises the audio fidelity of this FLAC source, noting that the high‑resolution sound is surprisingly good and worth a listen. While the performance itself isn’t discussed in detail, the lack of crowd noise is mentioned as a minor downside. Overall the recording is considered a solid capture of the show.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) focusing on excellent sound quality; no performance details to raise or lower rating, so a solid but cautious 4‑star score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: High‑resolution FLAC sounds clear and well balanced; reviewer misses audience ambience but overall audio is praised.
